name: How Do You Play?
overview: Yoo Jae-suk reunites the producing team of Infinite Challenge and presents you How Do You Play? The Indefinitely expanding YOONIVERSE, based on Yoo's blood, sweat, and tears, will entertain viewers at home. Let's follow Yoo and his friends' new projects every week.

trailers.title: Din Din "Why do you treat him differently?" [How Do You Play? Ep 1]
Yu Jae Seok's second characters are popular every time [How Do You Play]
